about.heading: About
profileBody: I'm s12kuma01. I do Minecraft modding and Discord bot development as a hobby.
I mostly just build whatever random idea pops into my head. I get bored really easily — sometimes I'll buy a new game and lose interest while it's still loading.
about.interestsBody: I mostly work on Minecraft — optimizing rendering and adding visual options — mainly on 1.12.2 (Cleanroom Loader), a version I absolutely love. I also build Arch Linux setups and playful Discord bots on the side. I did give NixOS a shot, but it was too hard and I gave up in tears.
